obligations.description: every registered occurrence has a current terminal pointer for required stages, every admitted Matter has owner decisions, en/zh-CN values, representative visual or placeholder, and an openable current C12 projection
repeating logical input all_registered_objects_terminal_and_ui_ready must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
missing or stale owner stages are deterministically scheduled without user confirmation
repeating logical input missing_or_stale_stage_work must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
a validated finding cannot reach C12 until its declared owner returns one terminal result
repeating logical input typed_finding_owner_join_pending must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
one blocked object is terminally visible while unrelated work keeps advancing
repeating logical input one_object_blocked_others_progress must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
current partial inventory is visible but cannot support a complete coverage claim
repeating logical input progressive_inventory_partial must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
missing, blocked, or stale depth obligations schedule bounded owner work
repeating logical input semantic_depth_partial must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
admitted Matter lacks current visual, localization, or UI reachability
repeating logical input visual_localization_or_ui_gap must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
non-research autonomous work continues but complete v0.1 release cannot claim research
repeating logical input researchguard_pending must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
a stale child receipt invalidates the parent snapshot and schedules its owner
repeating logical input stale_child_receipt must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
every declared child output must have one downstream consumer or typed terminal
repeating logical input unconsumed_child_output must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
optional correction or revocation invalidates and schedules exact affected owners
repeating logical input correction_invalidates_downstream must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
restart revalidates authorization/freshness and resumes only nonterminal work
repeating logical input restart_from_checkpoint must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
an unchanged inventory and policy creates no duplicate analysis or projection work
repeating logical input unchanged_rescan must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
M0 coordinates pointers and work but never copies or writes a C1-C12 fact
repeating logical input parent_attempts_child_write must be idempotent and emit no canonical write

obligations.description: authorized roots and mailbox policy are frozen before broad content reads
repeating logical input candidate_scope_frozen must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
current policy admits the occurrence to staged extraction
repeating logical input tracked_current must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
a current, reversible, policy-licensed AI triage result records reason and confidence
repeating logical input ai_not_tracked_current must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
uncertain or protected content receives a conservative automatic metadata-only disposition with confidence and reason
repeating logical input ai_uncertain_or_protected must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
a placeholder, denied object, or unsupported payload receives a terminal unavailable disposition while retry policy remains explicit
repeating logical input temporarily_unavailable_item must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
every enumerated item and required page has one current terminal disposition
repeating logical input all_items_and_pages_terminal must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
missing page, unknown item, or nonterminal worker state prevents a complete claim
repeating logical input nonterminal_or_missing_page must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
a bounded resource failure checkpoints direct entries and safe child scopes instead of holding the whole tree in memory
repeating logical input large_root_budget_exceeded must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
the parent directory boundary is terminal routing evidence while its declared child scope owns content coverage
repeating logical input parent_partition_boundary must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
a child scope retains original-root path policy tokens so a generated-state ancestor cannot disappear at a partition
repeating logical input partition_child_retains_policy_context must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
known software-control, dependency, cache, build, and temporary directories receive a terminal policy disposition before the partition coordinator creates descendant work
repeating logical input generated_state_pruned_before_partition must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
a missing, failed, interrupted, or stale required child partition prevents aggregate completion
repeating logical input partition_child_pending_failed_or_stale must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
large inventories atomically checkpoint bounded node batches; an interruption may repeat only the current idempotent batch
repeating logical input partition_checkpoint_batch_progress must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
a root child is scanned as one bounded subtree and creates descendant partition nodes only after the scan exhausts the frozen per-scope entry budget
repeating logical input bounded_child_scanned_before_further_partition must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
a bounded content canary first selects the smallest current tracked partition that can fill the remaining sample, or the largest useful partial partition when none can
repeating logical input canary_smallest_sufficient_partition_first must be idempotent and emit no canonical write

per-item source, evidence, analysis, original-owner dispatch, Matter, localization, visual, and projection stage updates defer global coverage aggregation until the bounded canary or one AI-result dispatch reaches its terminal join
repeating logical input canary_stage_updates_batch_summary_once must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
within a bounded Gmail content budget, tracked messages whose authorized page already supplies content are selected before tracked metadata-only messages while the exact limit remains enforced
repeating logical input gmail_budget_prioritizes_supplied_authorized_content must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
the exact partition manifest and every required child scope and occurrence are current and terminal
repeating logical input all_partitions_and_items_terminal must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
a policy revision invalidates and automatically reschedules affected tracking decisions
repeating logical input tracking_policy_changed must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
a policy-only reconciliation preserves an explicit user intent until the user replaces it or authorization is revoked
repeating logical input policy_changed_after_user_override must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
one current source occurrence, source revision, policy revision, and disposition produce one opaque action token; supersession invalidates the prior token
repeating logical input source_catalog_action_current must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
object, link target, or operation is outside authorization
repeating logical input outside_scope must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
revocation stops reads and invalidates dependents
repeating logical input authorization_revoked must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
configured private root is physically outside public build and Git roots
repeating logical input private_root_outside_git must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
the installed default uses one non-virtualized user-profile directory so Python files and native SQLite resolve to the same physical private authority
repeating logical input installed_private_root_single_physical_authority must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
inside-Git private roots are forbidden without fallback
repeating logical input private_root_inside_git must be idempotent and emit no canonical write

failed, stale, or missing owner disposition blocks fresh projection
repeating logical input required_owner_failed_or_missing must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
restart resumes only missing owners after authorization and freshness revalidation
repeating logical input restart_with_current_checkpoint must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
revocation stops reads and invalidates derived state
repeating logical input authorization_revoked must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
correction cannot change only the projection
repeating logical input ui_only_patch_request must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
C10 requests recompute and never writes another owner field
repeating logical input direct_foreign_state_write must be idempotent and emit no canonical write

obligations.description: current tracked evidence anchors are chunked into a bounded, private, evidence-whitelisted WorkPackageV2 with prompt, schema, policy, owner, locale, model, skill, and input-dependency identities
repeating logical input extracted_anchors_queued must be idempotent and emit no canonical write

one terminal result uses only package evidence refs and persists non-empty en and zh-CN values against the same semantic revision, accounts every input, validates the typed owner schema, and automatically appends one idempotent original-owner dispatch
repeating logical input valid_bilingual_understanding_result must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
a current typed finding is automatically delegated exactly once to its declared C1/C4-C9/C12 owner without a confirmation token
repeating logical input typed_finding_auto_dispatched must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
no-finding and policy-rejected outcomes are durable terminal dispositions with complete input accounting
repeating logical input no_finding_or_policy_rejected must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
failed or blocked execution is terminal and visible but creates no understanding candidate and no canonical state
repeating logical input analysis_operation_failed_or_blocked must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
current scoped AI output is typed, recorded, and automatically owner-routed
repeating logical input current_ai_finding must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
one frozen compatible ResearchGuard identity returns schema-valid anchored advisory output
repeating logical input current_researchguard_result must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
missing package, command, top-level skill, manifest, compatibility, or currentness blocks real research execution
repeating logical input researchguard_not_current must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
separate SourceGuard, TraceGuard, or LogicGuard paths are stale/source-only migration evidence
repeating logical input legacy_parallel_guard_binding must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
triage emits a reversible C1 disposition with reason, confidence, policy, and freshness identity
repeating logical input current_scope_triage must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
required source classes, anchors, contradiction checks, owner decisions, localization, visual, and projection state satisfy current depth policy
repeating logical input depth_sufficient_current must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
missing, blocked, or stale obligations remain visible and schedule bounded work
repeating logical input depth_partial_or_stale must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
allowlisted current C2/C3/C6 candidates receive a deterministic recommendation; C12 remains the display-decision owner
repeating logical input visual_candidates_ranked must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
source, policy, model, provider, tool, schema, or active skill identity changed
repeating logical input stale_operation_result must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
adjacent-source read, undeclared tool, or external action is rejected
repeating logical input scope_escape_attempt must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
future forecast remains separate from current lifecycle state
repeating logical input forecast_delay must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
AI or ResearchGuard output cannot write a canonical field
repeating logical input research_direct_canonical_write must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
skipped, not-run, or progress-only evidence cannot be promoted
repeating logical input skipped_or_progress_receipt must be idempotent and emit no canonical write

obligations.description: non-empty en and zh-CN values express one semantic revision; additional locales require complete registered values
repeating logical input same_revision_equivalent must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
desktop first launch defaults to English without changing canonical data
repeating logical input first_launch_without_preference must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
locale changes only display projection and preserves object-browser context
repeating logical input select_chinese_same_context must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
a future locale is published only after complete semantic-equivalence validation
repeating logical input future_locale_complete must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
missing English or Chinese values block a fresh complete projection
repeating logical input missing_required_locale must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
one bounded current catalog window renders Databank-authority cards
repeating logical input matter_catalog_current must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
catalog and detail readers resolve every visible Matter's coverage relations through one current private index batch instead of transferring and reparsing the full ledger per card
repeating logical input matter_coverage_relation_index_current must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
search/filter updates a bounded window while preserving density, locale, selected Matter, and restorable scroll context
repeating logical input catalog_search_or_filter_changed must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
Standard/Compact changes geometry only; Matter order, status, visual, locale, filters, selection, and responsive mode remain unchanged
repeating logical input density_switched must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
responsive columns change independently of persisted density
repeating logical input viewport_changed must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
one card remains top-aligned and never stretches or vertically centers
repeating logical input single_card_catalog must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
detail exposes Overview, Timeline, People, Actions/open loops, Related Matters, Images, Files/messages, and Evidence/history
repeating logical input matter_detail_opened must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
localized sentences distinguish record time from occurred time, badge planned/reported/observed/inferred, and retain conflicts
repeating logical input human_readable_timeline must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
C12 chooses one current allowlisted C2/C3/C6 candidate using C11 recommendation and deterministic fallback
repeating logical input eligible_visual_selected must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
no safe relevant current candidate yields a stable neutral placeholder
repeating logical input no_eligible_visual must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
optional source, semantic, or cover correction delegates to C10
repeating logical input optional_correction_requested must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
one blocked object or provider does not make current catalog objects unusable
repeating logical input background_work_pending_or_blocked must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
an older revision, cancelled request, or stale page cannot overwrite current UI state
repeating logical input stale_or_cancelled_response must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
C12 never publishes a fresh projection before required owner joins are terminal
repeating logical input recompute_not_terminal must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
desktop and browser surfaces cannot infer or write canonical product state
repeating logical input ui_infers_state must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
paths, message ids, hashes, receipts, tokens, and internal model ids are hidden
repeating logical input internal_identifier_requested_by_default must be idempotent and emit no canonical write
